stories.title: Big winners, losers and value picks of Round 1: Kiper on a wild start to the NFL draft
stories.summary: Mel Kiper Jr. makes sense of the first round of the NFL draft, sizing up moves such as the Makai Lemon, Caleb Downs and Ty Simpson picks.

stories.title: Pick-by-pick takes on Round 1 of the NFL draft: How prospects fit with their new teams
stories.summary: Here's our NFL Nation reporters' look at the biggest questions for each Round 1 pick and how every player fits with his new team.

stories.title: Shiver: U-M didn't protect me enough from Moore
stories.summary: Former Michigan football staffer Paige Shiver characterized her relationship with Sherrone Moore as an "open secret" within the athletic department and said those in leadership didn't do enough to protect her from the former Wolverines coach.

stories.title: Rams take Simpson, note 'this is Matthew's team'
stories.summary: The Rams selected quarterback Ty Simpson with the 13th pick in the NFL draft, though coach Sean McVay made it clear: "This is Matthew's team."

stories.title: Love favored for ROY, followed by Tate, Mendoza
stories.summary: Jeremiyah Love is the favorite to win offensive rookie of the year.
